case_title: PAULA S BEHMKE VS. THOMAS O'BRIAN

docket_entries.description: REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $463.78 FILED BY BEHMKE, PAULA S BEHMKE REPORTING AND VIDEO SERVICE, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT O'BRIAN, THOMAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
